mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO member_gmv_record_douyin ( base_id,third_party_account, user_id,third_party_nike, third_party_order_id,third_party_commodity_id, price,payment_time )VALUES
(#{item.baseId},#{item.thirdPartyAccount}, #{item.userId},#{item.thirdPartyNike}, #{item.thirdPartyOrderId},#{item.thirdPartyCommodityId}, #{item.price},#{item.paymentTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET gmv = gmv + #{gmv} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE member SET gmv = gmv - #{gmv} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
